subject: Re: M not responding
body:
>
> Good catch Alister! Yeah I had forgotten about this problem.
> @Shyamal, if you are running MobaXTerm, you can run chmod +rwx -R on your
> data folder.
> I would suggest chmod 777 -R but that could be dangerous since your data
> is on a shared network.
>
> On Tue, 18 Aug 2020 at 17:01, Alister Burt <alisterburt@gmail.com> wrote:
>
>> Hi Shyamal,
>>
>> I have a weird recurring issue which is similar, M sometimes hangs when
>> trying to write files at the end of a refinement. In my case it seems to be
>> some file permissions issue, even though everywhere I have full access
>> unclicking the read-only checkbox and applying recursively down through the
>> directory seems to fix it!
>>
>> Cheers,
>>
>> Alister
>>
>> On 18 Aug 2020, at 17:41, shyamal narayan <narayanshyamal@gmail.com>
>> wrote:
>>
>> ﻿
>> Hi Dimitry and others,
>>
>> I am running M (v1.0.9) and there was no problem. However, after sometime
>> there is no progress and it stuck on a tilt series (TS_749, please see
>> attached) for almost an hour now.
>> Did anyone have a similar problem? and is there a way to fix this?
>> Please let me know,
>> Thank you,
>> Shyamal
>> <Screenshot 2020-08-18 at 17.34.59.png>
>>
>>
>>
>>
>>
>>
>>
>>
>>
